name: The Hidden Love
overview: On a snowy night in the Northern City, Zhong Xiran is abandoned by her first love, Huo Xin, and finds herself married to Qi Sinian, a man who has secretly loved her for eleven years. Four years of a cold, loveless marriage follow, plagued by her ex's return, family pressure, and scandal after scandal. Then she makes a shocking discovery. Their marriage was a long-planned act of devotion.
